About DevRef

An open-source documentation platform built for developer teams who care about great docs.

DevRef started as an internal tool at a small startup that was tired of wrestling with docs tooling. We wanted something that felt like writing code — file-based, version-controlled, and fast to iterate on. Two years later, over 2,000 teams use DevRef to build and maintain their documentation.

The project is fully open source and funded by an optional hosted plan for teams that want managed search, analytics, and custom domains. The core framework will always be free.

We believe documentation is a product, not an afterthought. Every feature we build is designed to make docs easier to write, easier to find, and easier to keep up to date. If that resonates, we'd love for you to contribute — or just use it and tell us what's missing.
